prompt: Studio product photography of an amber glass supplement bottle and a matte white skincare tube arranged together on a dark wooden surface. Deep forest green background #2D4A3E, warm accent light from the right. Shallow depth of field, front product sharp, rear product softly blurred. Small ceramic bowl with dried botanicals between them. No text, no logos, no people. Premium, magazine-quality mood. Avoid: generic white studio background, clutter, artificial blue light, watermarks, stock photo cliches.
